title: Heavy Grav Mountainous Zones
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Heavy [[Gravity/Legends|Grav]] [[Mountain/Legends|Mountainous]] Zones''' were locations on [[Thrantin]].

Although the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] did not have such an area as a natural scape, it was artificially created by planet owner [[Barosa Warren]]. Warren spent decades planetscaping the world to create a controlled environment for his [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
